title: Validate Before Commit: reproducibility artifact (code and protocols)
description: Code, protocols and reproducibility guide for the paper 'Validate Before Commit: Candidate Governance for Drift-Triggered Classifier Pipelines in Network Intrusion Detection'. Includes the progressive-drift readaptation experiment runner (drift monitors, the validate-before-commit gate, downstream classifiers), the preregistered symmetric-pipeline dynamic replication (self-contained incumbent/challenger pipelines, frozen vs own transformer policies, seeds 3001-3030, Scenario-A machine-evaluated decision rules), all analysis scripts that regenerate every table and figure, the pre-registered protocols, and a claims audit that verifies every number in the manuscript against the generated artifacts. Datasets (CICIDS2017, UNSW-NB15, ToN-IoT) are public and not redistributed.
